title: Ubiquiti USW-Enterprise-8-PoE - UniFi Switch Enterprise 8 PoE
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: UniFi Switch Enterprise 8 PoE is a reliable manageable 2.5-Gigabit L3 Switch with a switching capacity of 80 Gbps , (8) 2.5-Gigabit LAN ports and two SFP+ (10 Gbps) slots. All Ethernet ports support 802.3af/at PoE-Out with an output power of 30 W/port and a total PoE budget of 120 W . In addition to the standard equipment, the switch also has a 1.3" touch screen for providing information about the system, temperature, port statistics, PoE power supply and much more. The switch can be powered… (8) 100M/1G/2.5G ports - 802.3af/at PoE+ support (30W/port) (2) 1/10G SFP+ ports 120W Total PoE capacity 1.3" touch display Desktop or wallmount mounting Supported in UniFi Controller from version 6.3.51 USW-Enterprise-8-PoE does not have web management but is managed centrally by UniFi Controller with support for the UniFi mobile application and offers an extensive set of advanced switching protocols and L2 functions, including operating mode (switching, mirroring or aggregation) per port. UniFi Network Controller and mobile applications allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all graphical user interface functions from anywhere Device Power cord Wallmount kit
